x_pcap_mapper_note: Offline bundled ATT&CK v14-selectable compatibility bundle generated from the project bundled v18 technique registry. Replace with the official MITRE Enterprise ATT&CK v14.0 STIX bundle for version-exact compliance. Synthetic x_mitre_data_sources were added from the project component map so offline selectable bundles can exercise the STIX-only pipeline; replace with official MITRE STIX bundles for authoritative version mappings.
